chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8119 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.17271/2018 2. For hearing of CMA No.15341/2017 3. For hearing of main case 11.02.2025 Ms. Alizeh Bashir, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Waseem Iqbal, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Per learned counsel, the petition impugns a notice, however, same shall be contested before the issuing authority. It is sought that the notice be adjudicated, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, and pending the aforesaid no adverse action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent department articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
